summary: A CBS News report carrying the network logo and burned-in captions, structured as a before-and-after comparison at Eagle Pass, Texas. One frame, labeled 'December 2023', shows a reporter in front of a large crowd gathered along a riverbank with footage of people among concertina wire below. Another frame, labeled 'April 21, 2026', shows the same reporter at an empty brushy riverbank with the caption 'we have not seen a single migrant.'

script.scene: Reporter at Eagle Pass labeled 'December 2023' with a large crowd along the river behind him; caption references over-taxed Border Patrol agents.
The same reporter at an empty riverbank labeled 'April 21, 2026'; caption 'we have not seen a single migrant.'

notable_text: December 2023 Eagle Pass, Texas; April 21, 2026; we have not seen a single migrant.
